name: Greenside Golf Club
about: Greenside Golf Club is a premium golf simulator venue located in South Boston, featuring six AI-powered simulator bays. The facility offers year-round golfing access through a combination of state-of-the-art simulator technology and practice amenities. Greenside operates on a membership model with founding member options, targeting both serious golfers seeking practice and those looking for a social experience with food and beverage offerings. The venue is equipped with high-end tracking technology and professional-level launch monitors for accurate swing analysis and course simulation.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Foresight launch monitors provide comprehensive shot data including ball speed, launch angles, and spin metrics
Greenside AI camera system offers video swing analysis with AI-driven feedback and drill recommendations
Membership includes unlimited bay access with priority booking and club storage
On-site coaching available at member rates for skill development
Practice putting area available without booking requirements

food_and_drink.notes: Bar and lounge area; kitchen food collaborations mentioned
Full bar with craft beer, seltzers; complimentary beverage for founding members

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-level launch monitor capturing comprehensive shot data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs. The venue offers club storage and complimentary cleaning services for founding members.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a bar and lounge area with craft beer, seltzers, and coffee available. Outside food and drink policies aren't explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing for 18 holes, but simulator sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue doesn't market itself as kid-friendly. It focuses on adult golfers with bar service and a work-friendly lounge area.
